allow: Bash(node -e "var src=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('newari-data.js','utf8'\); eval\(src + '\\n;global.__L=NEWARI_LESSONS; global.__T=NEWARI_TIERS;'\); var L=global.__L,T=global.__T; console.log\('lessons',L.length,'tiers',T.length\); console.log\('L1',L[0].name,L[0].exercises.map\(e=>e.type\).join\(','\)\); console.log\('reqXp L1/L6/L11',L[0].reqXp,L[5].reqXp,L[10].reqXp\); var b=L[0].exercises.find\(e=>e.type==='BUILD'\); console.log\('build', b&&JSON.stringify\({en:b.english,answer:b.answer}\)\); var r=L[0].exercises[0]; console.log\('rule.q', r.question, '| opts', r.options.length, '| ans?', r.options.includes\(r.answer\)\);")
